cardinal_threshold.description: Maximum acceptable absolute bias for cardinal (probability scale) calibration

rank_order_threshold.description: Minimum acceptable Spearman rho for rank-order calibration
rank_order_threshold.status: PASSED at all tested N values

ordinal_boundary_threshold.description: Minimum Kendall tau for ordinal boundary stability

required_N_for_cardinal.description: Required sample size to achieve cardinal threshold (estimated)
required_N_for_cardinal.status: Not achieved at any tested N <= 369

note: Cardinal calibration requires |bias| < 0.02. At N=200, |bias|=0.328 >> 0.02. At N=369, |bias|~0.25 still >> 0.02.
